title: Vanilla Ruby : Tools - Armor
description: Adds New Ruby Material  Between Diamonds And Netherite Tools And Special Item ( Goggles )
body:
New Ruby Material Between Diamond And Netherite, This Mod Also Adds **Goggles** That Give You Night Vision Item 

## **Ruby Armor :**
 - Ruby Helmet
 - Ruby Chestplate
 - Ruby Leggings
 - Ruby Boots

## **Ruby Tools :**
 - Ruby Sword
 - Ruby Axe
 - Ruby Pickaxe
 - Ruby Shovel
 - Ruby Hoe

## **Ruby Items/Blocks :**
 - Goggles
 - Block Of Ruby
 - Ruby Ore
 - Deepslate Ruby Ore
